title: convolvulus racemosus
intro: Convolvulus racemosus, also known as Shooba or Indian root, is a perennial herb belonging to the morning glory family (Convolvulaceae). Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, Convolvulus racemosus is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and enhancing immune function. Convolvulus racemosus is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, and is also used in the form of tablets or capsules in modern herbal medicine.
